Opuntia echinacea, also known as Cumulopuntia echinacea, is a species of prickly pear cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. The health benefits of Opuntia echinacea include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and reduce inflammation due to its high content of antioxidants and fiber. The bioactive constituents of Opuntia echinacea include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Opuntia echinacea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support heart health and manage various health conditions.
